channel.title: Missing $15B Fortune
channel.description: The Wall Street Journal — The Journal. — Missing $15B Fortune

item.title: The Case of the Missing $15 Billion Fortune: Part 2
item.description: After Hermès heir Nicolas Puech announced his $15 billion fortune was missing , accusations started flying. Who had taken the money? Was it his…

item.title: The Case of the Missing $15 Billion Fortune: Part 1
item.description: Hermès is one of Europe’s most storied luxury brands, known for its Birkin bags and expensive silk scarves. One of the company’s biggest…
